description: A group of students needs to reserve a group study room in the main library for next Tuesday.

nodes.task_description: Guide the user to the library's online room booking system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the direct URL for the booking system.

nodes.task_description: Explain the booking policies, such as maximum reservation time and advance booking limits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the rules (e.g., 'max 2 hours per day').

nodes.task_description: Assist the student in navigating the system to find an available room and complete the reservation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent walks the student through the process, resulting in a successful booking.
